meta.name: canonical key collision demo - three groups
meta.purpose: Three pairs of near-colliding belief queries for demo-grade HoReN canonical-key validation.
meta.note: Targets are synthetic and key_prompts are answer-free retrieval aliases.

groups.theme: ambiguous word model across AI vs camera
ambiguous word bank across finance vs river geography
